name: West Coast Landscapes
tagline: Owner-built hardscape and masonry that transform Sonoma County yards.
seoDescription: West Coast Landscapes is an owner-operated Santa Rosa landscape and masonry company — patios, pavers, retaining walls, outdoor kitchens, fire features

sections.heading: Hardscape and masonry, built by the owner
sections.subheading: Owner Alex and his crew transform Sonoma County yards with stone patios, retaining walls, outdoor kitchens, and fire features — a Neighborhood Fave for clean, careful, high-quality work.

sections.heading: One owner, on every job
body: West Coast Landscapes is owner-operated by Alex, who started the company to raise the standard for outdoor-space transformations in Sonoma County. The crew works across masonry, concrete, carpentry, and custom landscaping — the full toolkit needed to build a backyard, not just plant one.

Neighbors voted West Coast Landscapes a Nextdoor Neighborhood Fave in 2025, praising work that's done effectively and left clean at the end of the day. From stone pathways and retaining walls to outdoor kitchens, fire pits, and QWEL-certified irrigation, the focus is on durable craftsmanship and beautifully transformed spaces.
highlights: Masonry, concrete, hardscape, carpentry & custom landscaping
Outdoor kitchens, water features & fire pits

items.title: Masonry & Concrete
items.description: Stone and concrete work — the structural backbone of patios, walls, and walkways.

items.title: Hardscape — Patios, Pavers & Walls
items.description: Paver patios, stone pathways, retaining walls, and stairs built to last in Sonoma soil.

items.title: Outdoor Kitchens & Fire Features
items.description: Outdoor kitchens, fire pits, and gathering spaces that extend the living area outside.

items.title: Water Features
items.description: Custom water features that bring movement and sound to the garden.

items.title: QWEL-Certified Irrigation
items.description: Efficient, water-wise irrigation designed and installed by a QWEL-certified crew.

items.title: Landscape Design & Construction
items.description: Full design-and-build landscaping, plus lighting and exterior details that finish the space.

items.title: Reach out
items.body: Call or message West Coast Landscapes and tell us what you need.

items.body: We look at the details and talk through the right approach with you.

items.title: We do the work

items.title: You’re set
items.body: The job’s done right, and we stand behind it.

sections.heading: Work with West Coast Landscapes
sections.body: Find us at Santa Rosa, CA. Call (707) 332-1414 — we’re glad to help.
